FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f845277b1a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T19:08:31Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T19:06:49Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/08 19:10:08.580540787 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580563751 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580564302 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580579886 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580587156 {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580600577 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580616370 new <- list()
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580617232 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580627998 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580628469 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580637702 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580638153 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580647237 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580647657 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580656721 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580657152 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580672525 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580673186 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580687958 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580688629 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580699455 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580699866 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580709510 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580709941 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580719345 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580719806 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580728899 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580729340 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580743331 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580744082 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580755139 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580773697 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580774218 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580786746 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580787177 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580797272 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580797693 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580807457 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580807868 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580823191 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580824133 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580859035 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580859816 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580889832 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580902801 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580903652 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580920758 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580921519 "default"))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580935470 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580935880 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580945235 }
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580945685 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580955280 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580955710 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580965325 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580965755 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580982470 }
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580983422 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580997052 }
2026/05/08 19:10:08.580997924 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581008059 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581009932 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581019616 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581020057 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581030002 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581030453 }
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581039306 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581039737 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581055330 }
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581056061 version <- old$version
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581068930 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581069752 "2.0")
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581086327 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581087058 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581099236 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581099727 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581109271 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581109702 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581120248 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581120688 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581131134 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581131605 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581151494 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581152196 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581172025 invisible()
2026/05/08 19:10:08.581172766 }
